featured.headline: White House intervenes for $620M Trump Jr.-linked deal while schools crumble
featured.dek: Federal government prioritizes corporate connections over infrastructure as Alaska schools need billions in repairs but receive fraction of funding.

articles.headline: The White House Intervened to Get a $620 Million Deal for a Company Tied to Donald Trump Jr.
Alaska's Deteriorating Schools Could Receive More Than $148 Million for Repairs. It's a Fraction of What They Need.
